ref_ubiquitin.description: Ubiquitin — one of the most extensively characterized stable, soluble, monomeric proteins known.
ref_ubiquitin.verified_title: STRUCTURE OF UBIQUITIN REFINED AT 1.8 ANGSTROMS RESOLUTION

ref_gb1.description: Streptococcal Protein G, B1 immunoglobulin-binding domain — a classic hyperstable, highly soluble biophysics workhorse.
ref_gb1.verified_title: TWO CRYSTAL STRUCTURES OF THE B1 IMMUNOGLOBULIN-BINDING DOMAIN OF STREPTOCCOCAL PROTEIN G AND COMPARISON WITH NMR

ref_sh3.description: Alpha-spectrin SH3 domain — a classic well-behaved folding model.
ref_sh3.verified_title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF A SRC-HOMOLOGY 3 (SH3) DOMAIN

ref_csp.description: Bacillus subtilis major cold-shock protein CspB — hyperstable, highly soluble nucleic-acid-binding domain.
ref_csp.verified_title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF THE BACILLUS SUBTILIS MAJOR COLD SHOCK PROTEIN, CSPB: A UNIVERSAL NUCLEIC-ACID BINDING DOMAIN

ref_ci2.description: Chymotrypsin inhibitor 2 (barley) — a classic hyperstable folding-model protein.
ref_ci2.verified_title: CRYSTAL AND MOLECULAR STRUCTURE OF THE SERINE PROTEINASE INHIBITOR CI-2 FROM BARLEY SEEDS

ref_fn3.description: Tenascin fibronectin type-III domain — a real, soluble, well-expressed beta-sandwich fold (also the scaffold family behind 'Adnectin' engineered binders).
ref_fn3.verified_title: STRUCTURE OF A FIBRONECTIN TYPE III DOMAIN FROM TENASCIN PHASED BY MAD ANALYSIS OF THE SELENOMETHIONYL PROTEIN

ref_acylphosphatase.description: Bovine testis acylphosphatase — a well-studied soluble, monomeric alpha/beta fold.

ref_barstar.description: Barstar — a well-characterized soluble, monomeric ribonuclease inhibitor.
ref_barstar.verified_title: THREE-DIMENSIONAL SOLUTION STRUCTURE AND 13C ASSIGNMENTS OF BARSTAR USING NUCLEAR MAGNETIC RESONANCE SPECTROSCOPY
